{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7663857?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/NeuroWinter", "id": 7663857, "login": "NeuroWinter", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc2NjM4NTc=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/NeuroWinter", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47735", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Summary

Arc's user-SQL validator (`internal/api/query.go:ValidateSQLRequest`) blocked only `read_parquet(` and `arc_partition_agg(` via regex denylist. The broader DuckDB I/O function family — `read_csv_auto`, `read_csv`, `read_json`, `read_json_auto`, `read_text`, `read_blob`, `glob`, `parquet_metadata`, `parquet_schema`, `read_xlsx`, etc. — was not blocked. RBAC table-reference extraction inspected only `FROM`/`JOIN` clauses, so scalar table functions in the `SELECT` list slipped past both layers.

### Impact

Any authenticated user, including a token with `permissions: []`, can read arbitrary local files via:

```
POST /api/v1/query
Authorization: Bearer <token>
{"sql": "SELECT * FROM read_csv_auto('/etc/passwd', header=false, columns={'l':'VARCHAR'}) LIMIT 5"}
```

Confirmed reachable targets:

- `auth.db` — bcrypt hashes for every API token, plus legacy SHA-256 rows.
- `arc.toml` — S3 secrets, TLS keys.
- `/proc/self/environ` — environment-variable secrets.
- Cross-tenant Parquet files — bypasses RBAC because the tenant scope is enforced at the table layer, not on raw file paths.
- SSRF when `httpfs` is loaded (any S3-backed deployment) — `read_csv_auto('http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/...')` reaches instance metadata IPs.

### Patches

Fixed in 2026.06.1 (PR #442) via a structural sandbox at the DuckDB layer:

1. `SET GLOBAL allowed_directories = [...]` enumerates Arc's legitimate filesystem prefixes (storage roots + tier prefixes + import upload dir + compaction temp).
2. `SET GLOBAL enable_external_access = false` (one-way at runtime).
3. Verified by reading back the flag.

After lockdown, DuckDB refuses to open any file outside the allowlist and refuses further `INSTALL`/`LOAD`. Already-loaded extensions remain callable.

### Workarounds

- Restrict API access to known-trusted networks via firewall rules.
- Temporary mitigation: add `read_csv*`/`read_json*`/`glob` etc. to `dangerousSQLPattern` in `internal/api/query.go` pending 2026.06.1.

### Credits

Reported by Alex Manson ([@NeuroWinter](https://github.com/NeuroWinter), https://neurowinter.com/) on 2026-05-19.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00029, "percentile": 0.08757}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p2j4-c4g6-rpf5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T23:51:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p2j4-c4g6-rpf5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p2j4-c4g6-rpf5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47735"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-08T23:51:19Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Basekick-Labs/arc/security/advisories/GHSA-p2j4-c4g6-rpf5", "https://github.com/Basekick-Labs/arc/pull/442", "https://github.com/Basekick-Labs/arc/commit/91bdc29d1a02178ccf8c66375eccf85203108dfb", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p2j4-c4g6-rpf5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Basekick-Labs/arc/security-advisories/GHSA-p2j4-c4g6-rpf5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Basekick-Labs/arc", "summary": "Arc has an authenticated arbitrary local-file read via DuckDB I/O functions that bypasses RBAC table-level checks", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:51:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p2j4-c4g6-rpf5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.0.0-20260520141557-91bdc29d1a02", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/basekick-labs/arc"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.0.0-20260520141557-91bdc29d1a02"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Arc has an authenticated arbitrary local-file read via DuckDB I/O functions that bypasses RBAC table-level checks
